name: ai-zippy-child/home-about
title: Home About
description: Split about section with image, heading, description, and feature list.

description.default: Nature Teak focuses on sourcing and supplying high-quality, sustainable teak wood that balances natural durability with industrial precision for the local trade. With a deep-rooted presence in Singapore's timber hub, we provide reliable raw materials and customised wood solutions.

featureOne.default: Ensuring contractors and designers have access to premium timber

featureTwo.default: Custom wood cutting and milling to precise specifications

featureThree.default: Sustainable sourcing with full wood grading expertise

featureFour.default: Regional distribution from Sungei Kadut, Singapore
